title: crataegus coccinea var. fulleriana
intro: Crataegus coccinea var. fulleriana, also known as the scarlet hawthorn, is a variety of flowering plant in the rose family that is native to the United States. The medicinal properties of Crataegus coccinea var. fulleriana include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and triterpenoids, which have been shown to have antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and cardiovascular-protective effects. The health benefits of this plant include reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and lowering cholesterol levels, making it a popular natural remedy for heart health. Crataegus coccinea var. fulleriana can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
